scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @clash-configuratoe/schema && npm run build --workspace @clash-configuratoe/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @clash-configuratoe/schema && npm run test --workspace @clash-configuratoe/schema && npm run test --workspace @clash-configuratoe/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @clash-configuratoe/schema && npm run typecheck --workspace @clash-configuratoe/web
scripts.release-check: npm run docs-check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
